---
title: "An Environmental Engineer's Intro to Data Science"
description: |
  Reflections on my decision to enroll in the Master of Environmental Data Science program at UC Santa Barbara's Bren School of Environmental Science & Management and first 3 weeks of class.
author:
  - name: Marie Rivers
    url: {}
date: 08-16-2021
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
preview: images/IMG_2596.jpg
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

Add text here

Distill is a publication format for scientific and technical writing, native to the web.

Learn more about using Distill at <https://rstudio.github.io/distill>.
